title: phreatia vanuatensis
intro: Phreatia vanuatensis, also known as the Vanuatu orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, specifically its extracts have been shown to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phreatia vanuatensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and processing its leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
